title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 513.305 - Executions issued from circuit court of Marion County — either division — effect
text:
513.305.  Executions issued from circuit court of Marion County — either division — effect. — All executions issued in pursuance of judgments rendered by either district number 1 or district number 2 of the circuit court of Marion County may be levied in any part of Marion County, or elsewhere.
(RSMo 1939 § 2430, A. 1949 H.B. 2121, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14558; 1919 § 13737; 1909 § 4286 
Effective 1-02-79
